attribution: Original brief notes by the project author with citation to ATSDR profiles and standard medical toxicology literature.

toxidromes.name: Cholinergic
toxidromes.signs: SLUDGE/BBB: salivation, lacrimation, urination, defecation, GI upset, emesis, bronchorrhea, bronchospasm, bradycardia. Miosis common.
toxidromes.causes: Organophosphates, carbamates, nerve agents, some mushrooms.

toxidromes.name: Anticholinergic
toxidromes.signs: Hot, dry, red, blind, mad: hyperthermia, dry skin, flushing, mydriasis, delirium, urinary retention, decreased bowel sounds.

toxidromes.name: Sympathomimetic
toxidromes.signs: Tachycardia, hypertension, hyperthermia, mydriasis, agitation, diaphoresis (vs anticholinergic dry skin).

toxidromes.name: Opioid
toxidromes.signs: CNS depression, respiratory depression, miosis, hypotension, decreased bowel sounds.

toxidromes.name: Sedative-hypnotic
toxidromes.signs: CNS depression, normal pupils, normal vitals (overdose may show respiratory depression).
toxidromes.antidote: Supportive; flumazenil for benzodiazepine in select cases.

toxidromes.name: Serotonergic
toxidromes.signs: Mental status changes, autonomic instability, neuromuscular hyperactivity (clonus, hyperreflexia), hyperthermia.
toxidromes.causes: SSRIs + MAOIs, linezolid, tramadol, dextromethorphan combinations.
